description: Cover letter for the Arabic-script letter on verso addressed to Eliyyahu, saying that Yosef b. Mukhtar had left with a friend a turban ('imama) worth 100 dirhams until he repays the amount in full. If he intends to travel he should swear that he would settle his affairs with Mufaddal b. al-Maqdisi in Bilbays immediately. Also mentions a company traveling to Jerusalem. Verso: Letter in Arabic script (not included in Goitein's transcription). (Information from Goitein's index cards)
